frame_label: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
generated_comment: Honestly, incidents like these just prove that girls need to take their own safety seriously. If you're out late, especially alone, you're just inviting trouble. Thoda practical rehna chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment subtly blames victims by implying they are 'inviting trouble' if out late and alone. It frames women's safety as solely their personal responsibility, disguised as 'practical advice' rather than addressing male violence or societal issues.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
